message:
style(html_export): compact tool badges and add search-hit message glow

Visual refinements to tool badges and search highlighting:

Tool badges:
- Reduce badge dimensions from 28px to 24px height/min-width and
  tighten padding (6px -> 4px) for a more compact appearance
- Remove .tool-badge-name styles (text label removed from badges)
- Convert .tool-badge-status from inline SVG box to a small absolute-
  positioned dot indicator (6px circle at top-right), hiding the
  Lucide icon. Status color now uses solid high-opacity oklch fills
  instead of low-opacity backgrounds with colored text.
- Simplify status variant styles to single background declarations

Search:
- Add .message.search-hit rule with primary border color and glow
  box-shadow, highlighting message containers that contain search
  matches

Update test assertions for new 24px badge dimensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
